title: FreeDeepAgents activity runtime config
description: Validates activities/<id>/runtime.json. Whitelist-only. Mirrors ALLOWED_RUNTIME_FIELDS in tools/activity_verifier.py.

llm_timeout_seconds.description: Per-turn LLM call timeout. Default 60. Bump to 180 for image-heavy activities.

llm_max_output_tokens.description: Per-turn LLM max_tokens override. Default comes from ACTIVITY_LLM_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS in .env. Raise for long-narrative activities (bedtime-story style).

docker_timeout_seconds.description: Per-turn Docker sandbox timeout. Default 120. Raise only for activities that genuinely need long sandbox command execution.

max_distinct_support_reads.description: Cap on distinct support files (workflows/policies/references) the agent may read per turn. Default 3. 0 = unlimited. Files in manifest.skill_sources are exempt.

data_schema_enabled.description: Opt-in: enable the typed KV data store. When true, activities/<id>/data.schema.json must exist; the runtime exposes data_get / data_set / data_append / data_delete / data_list_keys tools and seeds /instance/data.json from the schema's default. See references/data-store-tools.md.

write_todos.description: Opt-in: expose the deepagents write_todos planner tool to the main agent. Default false (the tool is hidden). Enable only for activities whose typical turn is a genuinely complex multi-step pipeline (3+ steps with external evidence or artifact work); fixed-card or single-tool turns should leave it off. Enforced per call via TodoToolPolicyMiddleware. See app/deepagents_runtime.py.

auto_memory_enabled.description: Per-activity override for the runtime's auto-memory layer (the one-line [auto] gist derived each turn; see app/auto_memory.py). When omitted or null, the global AUTO_MEMORY_ENABLED setting decides. Set false to turn it off for activities whose canonical card sequences look duplicated when echoed as gist. Mirrors app/models.py ActivityRuntimeConfig.auto_memory_enabled.

sse_debug_view.description: SSE debug view config. Bridges trace tool/llm events onto the chat SSE stream when enabled. Required to be declared explicitly when data.schema.json has any field marked x-auto-inject:false (verifier rule), because trace payloads can carry hidden-field tool returns. Mirrors app/models.py SseDebugViewConfig.

enabled.description: Master switch. Default false (secure by default). Enable for activities without hidden state that want richer dev-time observability.

include_tool_input.description: When enabled, include tool input args in tool_invoked events. Default true.

include_tool_output.description: When enabled, include tool return values in tool_completed events. Default true.

include_llm_messages.description: Reserved. Even when enabled the first version keeps prompts/messages out of SSE — only model/token metadata flows. Authors who need full prompts should read trace.jsonl directly.

redact_tools.description: Tool names whose start/end events still fire (so timing is visible) but with input/output replaced by "<redacted>". Use for activities that want progress indication without exposing hidden-field tool returns.

payload_max_bytes.description: Per-event input/output JSON byte cap. Oversized values are truncated and tagged truncated:true. Default 8192.

image_generate_model.description: Optional per-activity override for image_generate's model id (wanxiang model name like 'wan2.7-image-pro' or 'wanx2.1-t2i-turbo'). Falls back to the global IMAGE_GEN_MODEL env var when omitted. The image provider (wanxiang / future) itself is NOT per-activity — only the model id.

image_edit_model.description: Optional per-activity override for image_edit's model id. Falls back to the global IMAGE_EDIT_MODEL env var when omitted.
